hero.subheading: No one scrolls to the bottom of your product page. But AI does. Pavy.ai analyzes every detail — specs, reviews, shipping, return policies — and answers the moment customers ask. No guesswork. Only your data. One line of code to start.

product.title: Aero Pro Wireless
product.description: Experience the future of high-fidelity audio. Designed with acoustic precision, supreme comfort, and AI-optimized noise cancellation to elevate every beat.

chatbot.name: Pavy.ai
chatbot.userMsg1: What sizes do the ear cups come in? My head's pretty large.
chatbot.botMsg1: The Aero Pro has an auto-adjusting headband that fits 52–62cm. The memory foam ear cups adapt to your ear shape — no sizing needed!
chatbot.userMsg2: How's the noise cancellation? I'm in a noisy open office.
chatbot.botMsg2: Our AI-powered ANC adapts to your environment in real-time. It blocks up to 40dB — office chatter, AC hum, all gone. Toggle Transparency mode when you need to hear colleagues.
chatbot.userMsg3: Can I return them if they don't fit?
chatbot.botMsg3: Of course! 30-day no-questions-asked returns with free shipping. Most customers know they love it after the first listen though.
chatbot.botMsg4: Standard shipping is 3–5 business days, free on all orders. Need it sooner? Express next-day delivery is available for $9.99.

tenMinuteMyth.title: The 10-Minute Myth
tenMinuteMyth.description: Users expect instant answers. Humans take minutes. That gap is where your customer retention dies. We bridge it with 200ms resolution times.

scalingCosts.title:
Scaling
Costs
scalingCosts.description: Hiring is a linear cost. AI is an exponential advantage. Stop scaling your workforce, scale your intelligence.

hallucination.title: Hallucination Risk
hallucination.description: Generic AI bots guess. Ours verifies. Context-aware agents that only speak from your source of truth.

metric.label: Core Metric
metric.description: Reduction in human-agent dependency across enterprise accounts.

step1.title: 01. Autonomous Understanding
step1.description: Our agents don't just search for keywords. They understand the nuance of your business logic, tone, and specific service policies.

step2.title: 02. Live Context Sync
step2.description: Sync your entire ecosystem in minutes. Notion, Zendesk, Intercom, or raw docs. The AI stays updated in real-time as your documentation evolves.

step3.title: 03. Human In The Loop
step3.description: We don't replace humans; we empower them. The AI handles the noise so your team can focus on the complex, creative challenges that grow revenue.

1.quote: Pavy AI has transformed our customer support. We've seen a dramatic increase in conversion rates since implementation.

2.quote: The product recommendation engine is spooky good. It understands exactly what our customers are looking for.

3.quote: Easy to integrate and incredible support from the Pavy team. Highly recommended for any e-commerce business.

1.headline: How Luxe Fashion increased conversions by 32% with Pavy AI
1.challenge: Luxe Fashion struggled with high cart abandonment and customers unable to find specific styles.
1.solution: Implemented Pavy AI Chatbot with visual product recommendation and style matching.
1.results: 32% increase in sales conversion, 45% reduction in support tickets, and improved customer satisfaction scores.

resultBullets.3: Higher CSAT across all style categories

2.headline: TechGear achieves 3x faster customer response time
2.challenge: TechGear's support team was overwhelmed with technical questions and product availability inquiries.
2.solution: Pavy AI was trained on their technical documentation and real-time inventory data.
2.results: Response time dropped from 4 hours to instant, while maintaining 92% accuracy in technical answers.

resultBullets.1: Response time reduced from 4 hours to instant

3.headline: HomeBloom drives 45% more revenue from chat interactions
3.challenge: HomeBloom wanted to personalize the shopping experience for interior design enthusiasts.
3.solution: Deployed a custom-themed Pavy AI widget that acts as a virtual interior designer.
3.results: Average order value increased by 20% and revenue from chat-assisted sales grew by 45%.

resultBullets.1: 45% uplift in revenue from chat-assisted sales

q1.question: Do I need engineering resources?
q1.answer: No. Pavy.ai is headless and context-aware. Connect your data, and the agent synthesizes your methodology instantly.

q2.question: Is data privacy guaranteed?
q2.answer: We are SOC2 Type II compliant. Your data is never used for foundation model training. It resides in a siloed encryption layer.

productChatbot.title: Chatbot Product Details
productChatbot.description: Learn all about our highly customizable, AI-driven chatbot widget for your website.

hero.badge: AI that turns hesitation into conviction
hero.title2: the final question, the sale happens.
hero.description: Hesitant shoppers don't need discounts — they need certainty. Pavy.ai understands every detail of your product and answers accurately in under 3 seconds.

pdpAnalysis.description: Product name, price, specs, descriptions, shipping, return policy, customer reviews — Pavy.ai analyzes every element on the page and matches it precisely to each customer question.

chat.a1: Yes, it's IP68 rated — usable up to 1.5m for 30 minutes.
chat.q2: How long does the battery last?
chat.a2: The 72Wh battery runs up to 18 hours in normal use and 22 hours for video playback.
chat.a3: The body weighs 250g — engineered to be comfortable even after long sessions.
chat.a4: Unconditional returns within 30 days, with return shipping on us.
chat.a5: Three: Midnight Black, Starlight Silver, and Ocean Blue. Midnight Black is the most popular.

generic.label: Keyword-based chatbot
generic.answer: Sorry, I couldn't find an answer about "charging." Try one of these keywords: battery, support, returns, shipping.
generic.description: Only responds when a question exactly matches a predefined keyword. If the customer phrases it any other way, it stays silent.

PavyAI.label: Pavy.ai
PavyAI.answer: Yes — the 72Wh battery runs up to 18 hours in normal use, so you can go all day without charging.
PavyAI.description: Understands the intent behind the question, so it returns the right answer no matter how the customer asks.

hallucination.sharedQuestion: Can it last all day without charging?

reviewIntelligence.description: Reviews hold real-world details that product specs never mention. Pavy.ai analyzes them and surfaces lived experience inside every answer.

r1.author: K.
r1.text: The noise cancelling is incredible. I can actually focus in cafés.

r2.author: L.
r2.text: I have a large head and they still fit well — no discomfort even after 3 hours.

r3.author: P.
r3.text: Lasts 3 days on a single charge. Battery life is the real deal.

chat.q1: Are they comfortable for long sessions?
chat.a1: Review analysis shows very high comfort ratings over long wear — many users report 3+ hours with no discomfort.
chat.q2: Does the noise cancelling actually work?
chat.a2: 87% of reviewers are satisfied with noise isolation. Many report improved focus in cafés and offices.
chat.q3: Can I use them on a plane?
chat.a3: Many travel reviews report airplane use — most say engine noise becomes almost inaudible.
chat.a4: Most reviewers say the other side hears them clearly. Outdoor use in wind is noted as slightly weaker.
chat.q5: How do they compare to other headphones?
chat.a5: Strong comfort and battery satisfaction. Comparison reviews frequently say they're noticeably better than previous models.

q1.question: Can I change plans later?
q1.answer: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time from your dashboard. Prorated billing is applied automatically.

q2.question: Is there a free trial for the Pro plan?
q2.answer: Yes. Pro comes with a 14-day free trial — no credit card required. You can continue on Free after the trial ends.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: All major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX) and bank transfers for annual Enterprise contracts.

q4.question: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
q4.answer: Yes — annual billing saves you 20% compared to paying monthly. Enterprise customers can also negotiate multi-year discounts.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant and engaging for the individual user.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Pavy.ai, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our AI-powered customer service platform.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, subscribe to our newsletter, or communicate with us. This may include:

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Process transactions and send related information
Send technical notices, updates, and support messages
Respond to your comments and questions

sharing.title: 3. Sharing of Information
sharing.content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy. We may share information with:
items: Service providers who perform services on our behalf
In response to a request for information if we believe disclosure is in accordance with any applicable law
In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, or acquisition

security.title: 4. Security
security.content: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

gdpr.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR/CCPA)
gdpr.content: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including the right to access, correct, or delete the data we hold about you.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. You can manage your cookie preferences through our cookie consent banner.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Pavy.ai. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

description.title: 1. Description of Service
description.content: Pavy.ai provides an AI-powered customer service automation platform, including but not limited to chatbots, data analysis, and integration tools.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: To access certain features of our service, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

payment.title: 3. Fees and Payment
payment.content: Certain services are provided for a fee. You agree to pay all fees associated with your use of the service. Fees are non-refundable except as required by law or explicitly stated in our refund policy.

usage.title: 4. Usage Restrictions
items: Use the service for any illegal purpose
Reverse engineer or attempt to extract the source code of our platform
Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the service
Upload or transmit any viruses or malicious code

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content, features, and functionality of the Pavy.ai platform are the exclusive property of Pavy.ai and its licensors. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use the service for its intended purpose.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall Pavy.ai be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues.

termination.title: 7. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the service at any time, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including if you breach the Terms.

law.title: 8. Governing Law
law.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Pavy.ai is established, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of any material changes.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
